subcodes.first_line: O thou who adornest the preface of divine knowledge, esteemed Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh! The mention of that soul who is enraptured towards God in the letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مطرز دیباجه عرفان جناب آقا سید اسدالله ذکر آن منجذب الی الله را در مکتوب
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
